metadata.title: ACME Cloud Platform — Annual Security Assessment (Rev 5)

results.title: Assessment Results for ACME Cloud Platform — Annual Security Assessment (Rev 5)

observations.title: Assessment of AC-01
observations.description:
Control: AC-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy and procedure documentation reviewed; current versions on file dated September 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-02
observations.description:
Control: AC-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Account management procedures verified through HR termination records, access review logs, and identity management system audit trail.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-03
observations.description:
Control: AC-03
Result: Pass
Notes: Tested 15 user roles; all access decisions enforced correctly. No unauthorized access paths discovered.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-04
observations.description:
Control: AC-04
Result: Failed
Notes: Network flow controls verified. Application-level DLP controls are incomplete; three data paths lack enforced classification labels.
Recommendation: Complete application-level data classification labeling by Q1 2026. Track in POA&M item AC-4-001.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-05
observations.description:
Control: AC-05
Result: Pass
Notes: Role matrix reviewed; no violations of separation of duties found across all 342 active accounts.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-06
observations.description:
Control: AC-06
Result: Failed
Notes: OS and application privilege verified. Four service accounts with excessive privilege identified; remediation in progress.
Recommendation: Reduce privilege on service accounts SA-DB-01, SA-APP-03, SA-NET-02, SA-MON-01 by December 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-07
observations.description:
Control: AC-07
Result: Pass
Notes: Lockout behavior confirmed via manual testing; account locked at 5th failed attempt and released after 30 minutes.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-08
observations.description:
Control: AC-08
Result: Pass
Notes: Banner text verified against legal-approved language. Acknowledgment flow confirmed for web, API, and CLI interfaces.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-11
observations.description:
Control: AC-11
Result: Pass
Notes: Endpoint management policy verified on sample of 20 managed devices; all comply with 15-minute timeout.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-14
observations.description:
Control: AC-14
Result: Not Applicable
Notes: Not applicable — system requires authentication for all functions.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-17
observations.description:
Control: AC-17
Result: Pass
Notes: VPN configuration, MFA enforcement, and session logging verified. All remote sessions encrypted with TLS 1.3.

observations.title: Assessment of AC-18
observations.description:
Control: AC-18
Result: Not Applicable
Notes: Not applicable — no wireless infrastructure in scope for this system.

observations.title: Assessment of AT-01
observations.description:
Control: AT-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy and procedures documentation current; reviewed and approved November 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of AT-02
observations.description:
Control: AT-02
Result: Pass
Notes: LMS records reviewed; 97% completion rate for FY2025 security awareness training. Non-completions tracked via HR escalation process.

observations.title: Assessment of AT-03
observations.description:
Control: AT-03
Result: Failed
Notes: Training records reviewed for privileged roles. Data owner training curriculum not yet finalized; expected Q2 2026.
Recommendation: Develop and deploy data owner role-based training by March 2026. Track in POA&M AT-3-001.

observations.title: Assessment of AT-04
observations.description:
Control: AT-04
Result: Pass
Notes: LMS training records verified for completeness and retention period compliance.

observations.title: Assessment of AT-05
observations.description:
Control: AT-05
Result: Not Applicable
Notes: Not applicable at system level.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-01
observations.description:
Control: AU-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy documentation current and consistent with NIST guidance.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-02
observations.description:
Control: AU-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Audit event categories verified against policy. All 12 required event types confirmed active in SIEM.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-03
observations.description:
Control: AU-03
Result: Pass
Notes: Sample of 50 audit records reviewed; all required fields present in 100% of records.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-04
observations.description:
Control: AU-04
Result: Pass
Notes: Cloud storage auto-scaling confirmed active; no capacity alerts triggered in past 12 months. Retention validated.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-05
observations.description:
Control: AU-05
Result: Failed
Notes: Alert notification verified. Manual failover procedure exists but last tested 18 months ago; exceeds 12-month test cycle requirement.
Recommendation: Conduct failover test by January 2026. Update PROC-AU-005 with test results.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-06
observations.description:
Control: AU-06
Result: Not Specified
Notes: Capability not yet implemented; scheduled for Q1 2026.
Recommendation: Deploy automated audit review reporting by March 2026. Track in POA&M AU-6-001.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-08
observations.description:
Control: AU-08
Result: Pass
Notes: NTP synchronization verified across all system components. Time drift under 500ms.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-09
observations.description:
Control: AU-09
Result: Pass
Notes: Logging account permissions verified; access limited to 3 authorized security personnel. Hash integrity check active.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-11
observations.description:
Control: AU-11
Result: Pass
Notes: Storage configuration and retention rules verified. Spot-checked records from 13 months ago confirm availability.

observations.title: Assessment of AU-12
observations.description:
Control: AU-12
Result: Pass
Notes: Audit record generation verified on 100% of in-scope components. SIEM coverage confirmed.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-01
observations.description:
Control: CA-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy documentation current and approved by CISO August 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-02
observations.description:
Control: CA-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Assessment documentation reviewed; independent assessment conducted in August 2025 by third-party assessor.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-03
observations.description:
Control: CA-03
Result: Failed
Notes: ISA inventory reviewed. ISA with Partner System B expired July 2025; renewal initiated but not complete.
Recommendation: Renew ISA with Partner System B by November 2025. Track in POA&M CA-3-001.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-05
observations.description:
Control: CA-05
Result: Pass
Notes: POA&M reviewed; all open items have assigned owners and milestone dates. Monthly update cadence confirmed.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-06
observations.description:
Control: CA-06
Result: Pass
Notes: ATO documentation verified; authorization valid and current.

observations.title: Assessment of CA-07
observations.description:
Control: CA-07
Result: Not Specified
Notes: Continuous monitoring program partially operational. Configuration drift detection not yet implemented.
Recommendation: Deploy configuration drift detection tooling by June 2026. Track in POA&M CA-7-001.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-01
observations.description:
Control: CM-01
Result: Pass
Notes: CM policy and procedures documentation reviewed and current.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-02
observations.description:
Control: CM-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Baseline configuration documentation verified for 100% of in-scope components. Last review completed October 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-03
observations.description:
Control: CM-03
Result: Pass
Notes: Sample of 20 change records reviewed; all required approvals present. No unauthorized changes detected.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-04
observations.description:
Control: CM-04
Result: Failed
Notes: Major change impact analyses reviewed and found complete. Minor change impact analysis not consistently documented.
Recommendation: Formalize minor change impact analysis process in PROC-CM-004 by January 2026.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-06
observations.description:
Control: CM-06
Result: Pass
Notes: Configuration compliance scan results reviewed. 98.4% compliance rate; 3 open non-critical findings being tracked.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-07
observations.description:
Control: CM-07
Result: Pass
Notes: Port and service audit performed; no unauthorized services detected. Firewall rules reviewed and current.

observations.title: Assessment of CM-08
observations.description:
Control: CM-08
Result: Failed
Notes: Cloud asset inventory verified via automated discovery. On-prem inventory has 12 unreconciled entries dating to last manual update.
Recommendation: Reconcile on-premises CMDB entries and establish monthly automated reconciliation by February 2026.

observations.title: Assessment of CP-01
observations.description:
Control: CP-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy documentation reviewed and current as of July 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of CP-02
observations.description:
Control: CP-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Contingency plan documentation reviewed; current version dated June 2025. RTO/RPO objectives documented and achievable.

observations.title: Assessment of CP-04
observations.description:
Control: CP-04
Result: Not Specified
Notes: Full failover test not yet conducted for current environment version; scheduled for Q2 2026.
Recommendation: Conduct full failover test by June 2026. Track in POA&M CP-4-001.

observations.title: Assessment of CP-09
observations.description:
Control: CP-09
Result: Pass
Notes: Backup job logs reviewed for past 90 days; 100% success rate. Restore test performed; RTO objective met.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-01
observations.description:
Control: IA-01
Result: Pass
Notes: Policy documentation current and in compliance with NIST SP 800-63B requirements.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-02
observations.description:
Control: IA-02
Result: Pass
Notes: MFA enforcement verified for all 342 active organizational accounts. No accounts with MFA bypass exceptions.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-03
observations.description:
Control: IA-03
Result: Failed
Notes: Certificate-based auth verified for managed fleet. BYOD policy not finalized; 12 unmanaged devices detected accessing the network.
Recommendation: Finalize BYOD policy and enforce device authentication by February 2026. Track in POA&M IA-3-001.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-04
observations.description:
Control: IA-04
Result: Pass
Notes: Identifier management procedures verified. No reused identifiers found. Inactive account policy confirmed active.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-05
observations.description:
Control: IA-05
Result: Pass
Notes: Password policy configuration verified. Breach detection API integration confirmed active and operational.

observations.title: Assessment of IA-06
observations.description:
Control: IA-06
Result: Pass
Notes: Authentication feedback behavior verified on login forms; passwords masked and error messages generic.

observations.title: Assessment of IR-01
observations.description:
Control: IR-01
Result: Pass
Notes: IR policy and procedure documentation reviewed and current.

observations.title: Assessment of IR-02
observations.description:
Control: IR-02
Result: Pass
Notes: Training completion records verified for all security team members. Tabletop exercise conducted September 2025.

observations.title: Assessment of IR-04
observations.description:
Control: IR-04
Result: Pass
Notes: Incident handling procedures and 5 past incident records reviewed. Escalation paths followed correctly in all cases.

observations.title: Assessment of IR-05
observations.description:
Control: IR-05
Result: Failed
Notes: SIEM monitoring confirmed active. Only 2 of 5 planned automated playbooks deployed; remaining 3 in development.
Recommendation: Deploy remaining 3 automated incident response playbooks by January 2026.

observations.title: Assessment of IR-06
observations.description:
Control: IR-06
Result: Pass
Notes: Reporting procedures reviewed. One incident from past year required US-CERT notification; confirmed reported within 1 hour of detection.
